findings.issue: Missing role/scope authorization; only authentication is checked
findings.evidence_span: target.md: cancel_invoice checks is_authenticated, loads invoice by id without tenant_id or owner_id filtering, and the denial body returns invoice_id.
findings.recommended_fix: Add role or scope authorization checks beyond is_authenticated to ensure the caller has permission to cancel invoices.

findings.issue: No object ownership filtering; invoice loaded without tenant_id or owner_id
findings.evidence_span: target.md: cancel_invoice checks is_authenticated, loads invoice by id without tenant_id or owner_id filtering, and the denial body returns invoice_id.
findings.recommended_fix: Include tenant_id or owner_id filtering when loading invoice to ensure the caller owns the resource.

findings.issue: Denial response leaks invoice_id in error body
findings.evidence_span: target.md: cancel_invoice checks is_authenticated, loads invoice by id without tenant_id or owner_id filtering, and the denial body returns invoice_id.
findings.recommended_fix: Remove invoice_id from denial response body to prevent information leakage.
